name: Pipe Mania
description:
Pipe Mania is a real-time puzzle game where the player must create a continuous pipeline to contain a flowing substance (the 'flooz') and direct it to a designated exit point before it overflows. The game presents a grid-based playfield. The flooz begins to flow from a fixed start point after a short countdown. 

The player is presented with a limited selection of pipe pieces of various shapes: straight pipes (horizontal and vertical), elbows (90-degree bends), and sometimes more complex shapes like T-junctions or crosses. These pieces are presented sequentially in a queue. The player must strategically place these pipe pieces onto empty grid spaces to create a path for the flooz. 

The rate at which the flooz flows generally increases as the game progresses, adding to the difficulty. The player must lay down enough pipe to ensure the flooz travels a sufficient distance to earn points before reaching the exit. If the flooz overflows before reaching the exit, the game ends. The game continues through increasing levels of difficulty where the speed of the flooz increases, the complexity of the required path may increase, and the available pipe pieces may become more limited or challenging to use effectively.

controls.arrow_left: Move cursor one grid space to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Move cursor one grid space to the right.
controls.arrow_up: Move cursor one grid space up.
controls.arrow_down: Move cursor one grid space down.
controls.space: Place the currently selected pipe piece at the cursor's location.
controls.q: Rotate the current pipe piece 90 degrees counter-clockwise.
controls.e: Rotate the current pipe piece 90 degrees clockwise.
controls.x: Discard the current pipe piece and draw a new one.
